Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest For Deceased Plaintiff
Off Calendar Sep-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF CLARENCE FANNIN's Motion For Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest For Deceased Plaintiff

Appearances:
Sarah Bendon of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-493-3563), appearing for plaintiff Clarence Fannin.

No other appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion for Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest for Deceased Plaintiff is granted. Nicholas Fannin is substituted as successor-in-interest for deceased plaintiff, Clarence Fannin pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 377.31. No opposition filed.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: S. Le. Not reported. (503/CML)

DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2019 Continued To Oct-17-19 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 503
